reviews.author: Nɪsʜʌɴт Rʌɴʌ
reviews.review_body: Our whole family likes being part of the school. Specially for my wife who made lots of friends and many opportunities to get involved with school activities. It is very helpful for families that are always on the move.

reviews.author: Sheikh Waseem
reviews.review_body:
The British School in New Delhi stands as a testament to educational excellence and a commitment to nurturing well-rounded global citizens. With its rich history and sterling reputation, this institution has become a beacon for those seeking a world-class education.

The academic prowess of The British School is evident in its rigorous curriculum that seamlessly blends traditional values with modern teaching methodologies. The dedicated faculty members go beyond imparting knowledge; they inspire critical thinking and foster a love for learning. The emphasis on holistic development is reflected in the diverse range of subjects offered, ensuring that students not only excel academically but also explore their passions.

Beyond the classroom, the school's commitment to extracurricular activities is commendable. State-of-the-art sports facilities, a vibrant arts program, and a multitude of clubs provide students with avenues to discover and hone their talents. The British School actively encourages participation in inter-school competitions, instilling a sense of healthy competition and camaraderie.

The school's emphasis on character development is notable. Values such as integrity, respect, and responsibility are woven into the fabric of daily life, shaping students into not just academically proficient individuals but compassionate and socially conscious global citizens.

In terms of infrastructure, The British School leaves no stone unturned. Modern classrooms, well-equipped laboratories, and a library stocked with a diverse array of resources contribute to a conducive learning environment.

Choosing The British School, New Delhi, is not just choosing an educational institution; it's choosing a transformative experience that prepares students not only for academic success but for a lifetime of meaningful contributions to society.

reviews.author: tamy s
reviews.review_body: I hate to see this school with so many 5 star reviews. It’s a terrible school with a flawed system. It favours some students over others and refuses to acknowledge any problems it has. In my time there I sustained many deregatory and outright racist comments while teachers were present. If you plan on joining this school or enrolling a student into this school I strongly recommend you don’t. You’ll regret it in the future when you’re failing and mentally ill.
